panels.title: Blocked trend
panels.description: 1 = port is owned but idle (no CP traffic). 0 = not blocked.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "port_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "port_utilization")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.chassis_id == "${chassis_id}" and r.port_id == "${port_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "blocked")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "port_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "port_utilization")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.chassis_id == "${chassis_id}" and r.port_id == "${port_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "blocked" and r._value == 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "owner"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 20)

from(bucket: "port_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "port_utilization")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.chassis_id == "${chassis_id}" and r.port_id == "${port_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cp" or r._field == "dp" or r._field == "utilization")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
